title: T-030 — POST /api/production/work-orders/:id/waste-record
prompt:
# T-030 — POST /work-orders/:id/waste-record

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.3 FR-08-E3-003, §8.2.3, §11.4 alert

## Goal
Implement POST /waste-record creating wo_waste_log entry with shift_id (V-PROD-19), category from waste_categories taxonomy, and triggering Shift Lead alert when waste% exceeds 5% threshold (default).

## Implementation contract
App Router POST /api/production/work-orders/[id]/waste-record. Zod body {transaction_id: uuid, operator_id: uuid, qty_kg: number(>0), category_id: uuid, reason_notes?: string}. withIdempotency. Atomic transaction: lookup active shift_id for line (T-038 helper), assert category_id references active waste_categories row (V-PROD-05), INSERT wo_waste_log. After commit, evaluate cumulative waste% for this WO (sum waste / sum consumption); if > prod_settings.waste_threshold_pct_alert (default 0.05), enqueue alert event (placeholder log; outbox emit in T-041). Return 200 {waste_id, recorded_at, cumulative_waste_pct, alert_triggered: boolean}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/waste-record/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/waste-record/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/record-waste.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given category_id valid + qty_kg=10, when POST waste-record, then 200 with waste_id and shift_id stamped (V-PROD-19)
2. Given category_id pointing to inactive waste_categories row, when POST, then 409 inactive_waste_category (V-PROD-05)
3. Given cumulative waste% crosses 5% threshold after this entry, when POST, then response.alert_triggered=true and an alert audit row written

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting happy + inactive category reject + alert trigger before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test work-orders.*waste-record'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow inactive waste category (V-PROD-05)
- Do not skip shift_id (V-PROD-19)
- Do not block on alert (warn only — Shift Lead receives notification)

pipeline_inputs.description: POST /waste-record with shift attribution + threshold alert.
pipeline_inputs.details: INSERT wo_waste_log with active shift lookup. Threshold 5% default from prod_settings. Alert enqueue is placeholder (audit row + outbox emit deferred to T-041). Active waste_categories enforced.
out_of_scope: Do not implement waste analytics screen (UI tasks)
acceptance_criteria: Given category active + qty=10, when POST, then 200 + waste_id + shift_id stamped
Given inactive category_id, when POST, then 409 inactive_waste_category
Given cumulative waste% crosses 5%, when POST, then alert_triggered=true and audit row written
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting happy + reject + alert before route exists
